item.title: Accenture, Vodafone, and SAP to pilot humanoid robots in the warehouse
item.description: The humanoids in the pilot are powered by Accenture’s Robot Brain solution, enabling them to interact naturally with human operators. The post Accentu...

item.title: SS Innovations is developing a drone-based surgical robot
item.description: SS Innovations designed the SSi Vimana Aero to bring robotic surgical care directly to wounded soldiers. It is also working on a surgical humanoid. Th...

item.title: GM’s Mikell Taylor to lead Women in Robotics Breakfast at the Robotics Summit
item.description: Mikell Taylor has spent 25 years making robots, from a robotic prom date to uncrewed underwater vehicles and industrial robotic systems. The post GM’s...

item.title: Pudu Robotics raises nearly $150M as it targets industrial applications
item.description: Pudu plans to use the funding to develop its embodied AI, grow its product portfolio, and expand in global markets beyond service robots. The post Pud...

item.title: End of an era: Honeywell hands warehouse automation reins to AIP
item.description: Honeywell to sell its Intelligrated and Transnorm warehouse automation brands to American Industrial Partners by late 2026. The post End of an era: Ho...
